title: What the Supreme Court's ruling means for businesses, and your portfolio
section_path: What the Supreme Court's ruling means for businesses, and your portfolio
section_path_text: What the Supreme Court's ruling means for businesses, and your portfolio
summary:
Main
The three things investors and businesses should know this week
The abolition of nearly 2/3 of "Liberation day" tariffs by the US Supreme Court prompted the White House to temporarily replaced them with a 10% to 15% blanket tariff. The Court's decision might have increased market uncertainty over the shorter term, but ultimately it reaffirms the rule of law in the US. Expect policy to remain fluid, and uncertainty around existing trade treaties to persist for some time, but ultimately the view is that the White House will have to purse product-related tariffs.
